title: Blockade of Kashyyyk (1 ABY)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Kashyyyk}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Event |prev= |conc=[[Rebel Invasion of Kashyyyk]]{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=faction|Imperial|Doing your duty, phase IV|Kashyyyk}} |next= |image=[[File:Ontheirwaytokashyyyk.jpg]] |name=Blockade of Kashyyyk |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' |date=c. [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]]{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=870#15778940|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-10-12|time=6:13 PM|quote=Wookiee Life Day occurs every 3 years, one of which fell at ~1.5 ABY.}} |place=[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] |outcome=Alliance victory |keyparties=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |participants=*[[B4711]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Saun Dann]] *[[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawarrump]] *[[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]] *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] *An [[Unidentified Moradmin Bast look-alike|Imperial officer]] }} {{Quote|We have ordered a blockade and a curfew. And, started a search operation. It's just a matter of time before we find the Rebels.''"
"''I want the Rebels located and identified. If it means searching every household in the system.|An Imperial Officer and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|}} The '''Blockade of Kashyyyk''' was an event in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], in which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] over the planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. ==Background== Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|First Death Star]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] ordered [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to hunt down those [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] responsible for the space station's destruction. As [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] were leaving [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] on one of their typical flights, they were intercepted by two Star Destroyers of the Empire, who had recognized the ''Falcon'' from a previous encounter during the [[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|escape from the first Death Star]]. After an attack by the two Star Destroyers, Solo sent the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] into lightspeed. However, the Empire traced the course that the ship had set, and tracked their route to Kashyyyk. ==The blockade== On the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']], an [[Unidentified Moradmin Bast look-alike|Imperial officer]] resembling the deceased [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Moradmin Bast/Legends|Moradmin Bast]] announced to Vader that he had ordered a blockade and curfew of the planet, and had started a search operation. Upon arriving near the atmosphere of Kashyyyk, the ''Falcon'' found itself under fire from [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], who were guarding the planet. Down on Kashyyyk, Imperial Agents entered the home of Chewbacca, where the family was preparing for [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]]. After doing an extensive search of the home, the Imperial Agents couldn't find a trace of the Rebels. [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpwarrump]] Chewbacca's son, had gotten ahead of the Imperials, he created a device that tricked the officers into leaving. Leading them to believe that the Rebels had already left the planet, thus sending the Imperials on a wild goose chase to a decoy location. Han and Chewbacca arrived at the home, and later, they all celebrated the holiday. By the time the Imperials had returned to Kashyyyk, after realizing they had been deceived, the Rebels had long gone. In response to the defeat, Palpatine decided to start over, by ordering the immediate resuming of the construction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]] over an unknown world. ==Behind the scenes== [[Lucasfilm]] employee [[Leland Chee]] has indicated that the instance of Life Day, an event occurring every three [[Standard year/Legends|years]], depicted in ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' as concurrent to the blockade, takes place in approximately [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]]. However, other sources suggest a different placement. The novel ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' establishes that a Life Day occurred approximately one [[Standard year/Legends|standard year]] prior to events dated by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' to [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],''[[Rebel Dawn]]''''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' equating to [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], with subsequent Life Days in [[0 ABY/Legends|0]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Similarly, Chewbacca's entry in ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' describes ''The Star Wars Holiday Special''{{'s}} Life Day as the first of two Life Days between the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']],''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' spanning 0 to 3 ABY, suggesting that Life Day and the blockade took place in 0 ABY. ==Appearances== *''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Wookiee%20Life%20Day|text=Wookiee Life Day}} *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Friday%20Feature:%20Kachirho|text=Friday Feature: Kachirho}} *{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66842&resource=features|text=Sickness of the Storm Lord}} {{Mo}} *{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66850&resource=features|text=Star Chart: Kashyyyk System}} *[[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]] *{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68542&month=122009|text=Friday Feature – What is Wookiee Life Day?}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 1 ABY}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kashyyyk (1 ABY), Blockade of}} [[Category:Battles of Kashyyyk]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Blockades]]
